film.title: Dil Bole Hadippa!
film.overview: Veera, a fire-cracker of a girl who lives in a small village but dreams of playing cricket in the big league. Rohan is an accomplished captain of a county cricket team in England. Rohan returns to India to captain his father's cricket team which has been losing for the last 8 years. In a Village where girls don't play Cricket, Veera has to put on a put on a turban & beard to live her dream.

dialogues.dialogue: She, who you turn into an idol and worship when she is human you crush her. Shame! Oye, Veera..Oh, Veera, child, why are you wasting time on this A B C D? Come here with me.
Hey! This is my Spot! Go back! Shame, shame, shame, shame! Oye, four-eyes! You shouldn't be so stingy! Half the nation is sharing poverty
Veera! Tomorrow morning, when you gel late in leaving for Lahore then you'll blame-shame Veera! Yes, but at least tell me, yes or nu?
Aman Cup? Yes, madam. For the last 8 years this cup has been the pride of Lahore! Oye, let it be. It seems that these Amritsar folks have developed
Thank you, Sir! Friends! Lahore's pride is once again heading to Lahore! Oye, my dear friend! Why are you standing there with a swollen face?
Okay, Sir? Handle with care! Hey, listen, Miss India! Today Indians all over the world making the India the proud so why are you thinking the so small? Very bad, Buffalo Girl!
You don't get another chance once you're out! Sir, by God I swear! To save this town's pride you won't find a better player than me. How good a player you are  that I've already seen.
